intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 8:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/2. 75% FTP, Seated. 8:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 8:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 90-90% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 90% for 12:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/2. 12:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/2. Power: 90-90%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 20 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 5min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 12:00. Then 5min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 12:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 5min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 12:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 88% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 88% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
